programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A police officer uses a deadly sheriffs badge to seek revenge against a mob boss for the murder of his wife

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office Also Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husbands better halves take the reins Carlos and Sonia repo a limo from an arrogant lotto winner whose luck has run out and Froy and Lou track down an RV as a side repo for a mom and pop shop unfortunately the repo goes disastrously wrong when the RV explodes and the fire department has to be called

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up and a ventriloquists dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonias bad side When Froy goes missing Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong but when Carlos reveals Froys true whereabouts tempers

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E05 Easy Come
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E05 Easy Come

programme.title: Bonanza 316
programme.desc: Bonanza 316

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A lovely woman helps Kimble escape but hes shot by police and taken in by a reclusive old mountain man who wants him to live with him

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Nelson is on assignment to locate narcotics hidden below the waterline of vessels in the harbor

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While conducting a visual and photographic survey for a State underwater park Mike becomes a target for murder

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A reporter on the airbase is bent on trying to prove that one of Gen Savages gunners is an escaped convicted murderer

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks the werewolf Janos Skorzeny to Hollywood where Skorzeny has been killing prostitutes But Eric is mistaken for the killer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: Hogans 312
programme.desc: Hogans 312

programme.title: Hogans 330
programme.desc: Hogans 330

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton refuses permission for McHale and The Crew to put on a big show to raise funds for the local Orphanage Parker uses his newly-acquired skill as a Hypnotist to make The Captain more agreeable But the scheme is complicated by the visit of a Senator from the Armed Services Committee

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker - A dead-ringer for an important British General - Agrees to put his life on the line by posing as The General to divert the attention of spies in New Caledonia while the real General carries out a crucial invasion of a Japanese-held island

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wont rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat

programme.title: Gomer 230
programme.desc: Gomer 230

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper believes that Gilligan has found The Eye of the Idol which gives him three wishes before sundown However the Professor believes it is just a silly superstition and just an ordinary cats eye

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A blow to the head gives the Skipper amnesia The Professor tries to cure him through hypnosis but he winds up believing that the other castaways are Japanese soldiers

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS agents from all over are each carrying one piece of a bomb that is going to be used against a government base Max has to disarm it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hawaiian detective Harry Hoo and Max track his old nemesis The Claw to a San Francisco laundry

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 1

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan play a computer-generated DD type game to rescue a man and his daughter being held hostage by the game master which the rules are you either win or you die

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before its even begun Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia the new boss is still struggling to keep the team in line but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ

programme.title: Cell 2455 Death Row
programme.desc: Whit condemned and awaiting execution reviews the events of his life that has brought him to Cell 2455 on San Quentins Death Row a story he had told in a autobiography that became a sensational best-seller As a boy the young Whit stole groceries to help feed his impoverished family later moving on into major crime to impress a young gang moll Jo-Anne and turns into a cold-blooded thug when he is repudiated by the girl he loves Doll And by his own lawyer when he is arrested and tried as the infamous Lovers Lane Bandit In cell 2455 he studies law to the point where he wins stay after stay twice within minutes of his scheduled execution

programme.title: Mikey And Nick
programme.desc: Nicky is on the run from the mob and he turns to old pal Mikey for help

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: As the Alphans are planning to explore the planet Ariel a missile attaches itself to the en route Eagle Upon returning to Alpha the missile gives the Alphans a lunar atmosphere But the joy at the possibility of making a new world out of the Moon is short lived as the moon does not enter orbit around the planet or its sun and Alpha faces destruction from the newly acquired lunar air

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Research continues on the scarecrow probe Boone starts learning Taelon to interpret its messages The device meanwhile absorbs a scientist Rayna

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens continue to expand their operations Sparked by random footage shot by a reporter Harrisons the team descend on the previously abandoned town of Beeton where they find a bustling community that in theory should not exist

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A death on a diving barge that Dr Kimble works on makes the owner want to get rid of Kimble so he cant testify to what happened

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath helps an old friend Ward and his wife Nora after Ward becomes crippled in an accident partly Heaths fault Tensions arise when Ward tries to guilt Heath into giving him 5000 for a timber investment

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne falsely accused of murder escapes the law He returns to White Bluff to clear his name by joining a train of settlers headed to California A ministers sister threatens to turn him in to the law until she gets to know him

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Det Keller goes undercover as an ex-con musician to bust a crooked parole officer and his ring of parolees

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jack Cole was arrested and imprisoned for stealing art treasures of a Latin nation The mission for Phelps and the IM team is to get the objects back But that wont be easy Coles being tortured by the colonel who heads the prison -- and the colonels a traitor who wants the treasure for himself The IMF plans calls for playing the 2 men each deadly off each other

programme.title: Gimmer 2
programme.desc: Gimmer 2

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: The Tommyknockers
programme.desc: The small town of Haven becomes a hot-bed of inventions all run by a strange green power device The whole town is digging something up in the woods and only an alcoholic poet can discover the secret of the Tommyknockers

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mario Rinaldi v. Sergey Kaznovsky

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands

programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it
